source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/03_제품별 인증서 & 성적서/2. 제품별 성적서/01_HAD1717MC, MG/1. IEC 60601-1 외/[HAD1717MC] IEC 60601-1-2 Test report (Kolas, ed 4.1).pdf

document.title: TEST REPORT - Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector - Report No. REP016220

sourceSummary.oneLine: KOLAS-accredited Nemko Korea EMC test report REP016220 for H&abyz Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models HAD1717MC, HAD1717MG, and HAD1717VC.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory evidence for IEC/EN 60601-1-2 electromagnetic emissions and immunity compliance testing of the listed detector models.
keyPoints: The report identifies the product as a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector with models HAD1717MC, HAD1717MG, and HAD1717VC.
Testing was performed from October 24, 2023 to December 19, 2023, and the report is dated June 21, 2024.
Emission and immunity verdict summary entries shown in the report are pass where applicable.
The intended environment is a professional healthcare facility environment.

evidence.claim: Report REP016220 is a test report issued by Nemko Korea for a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: TEST REPORT Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. Report No.: REP016220; Sample Description : Model / HAD1717MC, HAD1717MG, HAD1717VC Product / Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The tested models are HAD1717MC, HAD1717MG, and HAD1717VC.
The client and manufacturer are H&abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Client Name : H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Manufacturer : H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The test method used includes EN 60601-1-2:2015 and IEC 60601-1-2:2014.
The test method used includes EN 60601-1-2:2015/A1:2021 and IEC 60601-1-2:2014/AMD1:2020.

evidence.evidenceText: The product fulfils the requirements of IEC 60601-1-2:2014 and EN 60601-1-2:2015 IEC 60601-1-2:2014/AMD1:2020 and EN 60601-1-2:2015/A1:2021

evidence.claim: Testing was performed from October 24, 2023 to December 19, 2023.
evidence.evidenceText: Date of Test : October 24, 2023 to December 19, 2023

evidence.claim: The report certificate date is June 21, 2024.
evidence.evidenceText: June 21, 2024 Nemko Korea Testing Laboratory Accredited by KOLAS, Republic of KOREA

evidence.claim: The test certificate is accredited by Korea Laboratory Accreditation Scheme and KOLAS.
evidence.evidenceText: The above test certificate is the accredited test results by Korea Laboratory Accreditation Scheme, which signed the ILAC-MRA. June 21, 2024 Nemko Korea Testing Laboratory Accredited by KOLAS, Republic of KOREA

evidence.claim: The product is intended for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children, and is not for mammography or direct cardiac application.
evidence.evidenceText: ADD Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children. Not to be used for mammography and direct cardiac application.
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Intended Use

evidence.claim: The intended environment is a professional healthcare facility environment.
evidence.evidenceText: Intended ENVIRONMENT Professional healthcare facility environment

evidence.claim: The EUT rating is AC 100-240 V, 50/60 Hz, 80 VA input and DC 12 V output through the power supply box.
evidence.evidenceText: Ratings : Power supply box INPUT : AC (100 - 240) V, (50 / 60) Hz, 80 VA OUTPUT : DC 12 V

evidence.claim: Terminal disturbance voltages and radiation disturbance under CISPR 11 were passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 7.1 Terminal disturbance voltages CISPR 11:2015 +A1:2016 + A2:2019 P; 7.1 Radiation disturbance CISPR 11:2015 +A1:2016 + A2:2019 P

evidence.claim: AC mains harmonics and voltage fluctuations/flicker tests were passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 7.2.1 AC-Mains Harmonics IEC 61000-3-2:2018/AMD1:2020 P; 7.2.2 AC-Mains Voltage fluctuations and flicker IEC 61000-3-3:2013/AMD1:2017 P

evidence.claim: Referenced IEC 60601-1-2 immunity tests were passed where applicable.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 60601-1-2 referenced immunity standards Clause Requirement – Test case Basic standard Verdict ... ELECTROSTATIC DISCHARGE IEC 61000-4-2:2008 P ... Radiated RF EM fields IEC 61000-4-3:2020 P ... Immunity to proximity magnetic fields IEC 61000-4-39:2017 P

evidence.claim: Essential performance during EMC testing includes normal operation, consistent DC power from the power box, normal manufacturer program operation, and intended image acquisition.
evidence.evidenceText: The essential performance for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector during EMC test was defined as follows. - Operation normally when operation is required - DC power is consistently supplied from Power box when EMC test is performed. - When connected to Power box, program provided by manufacturer is operated normally. - Acquisition image is obtained as intended.

reviewFlags.reason: Metadata authoritySignal lists FDA, but the source text only supports KOLAS, Korea Laboratory Accreditation Scheme, Republic of Korea, and ILAC-MRA as accreditation or jurisdiction signals.
Pages 60 through 101 contain page headers with little or no extracted content, which may indicate blank pages, image-only pages, or incomplete OCR for those sections.
The source includes a form revision NKQF-27-04 (Rev.8), but no separate report revision number is explicitly stated.
The sourcePath names HAD1717MC, but the report text covers models HAD1717MC, HAD1717MG, and HAD1717VC.
